# madock

> madock is a Docker-based local development environment tool written in Go. It automates project setup with Docker Compose, supports multiple simultaneous projects via an nginx proxy, and provides platform-specific workflows for Magento 2, Shopware, Shopify, PrestaShop, and custom (PHP/Node.js/Python/Go/Ruby) projects.

## Commands

All commands are run as `madock <command>`.

### Project Lifecycle
- `setup` — interactive project setup (auto-detects platform). Flags: `--platform`, `--language`, `--yes`, `--download`, `--install`
- `start` — start containers
- `stop` — stop containers
- `restart` — restart containers
- `rebuild` — rebuild containers (recreates docker-compose and Dockerfiles)
- `status` — show container status (supports `--json`)
- `install` — install platform (Magento/Shopware/PrestaShop)
- `project:remove` — remove project (flags: `--force`, `--name`)

### Shell & Execution
- `bash` — open shell in container (flags: `--service`, `--user`, `--shell`)
- `cli` — execute command in container
- `composer` — run composer command
- `magento` / `m` — run Magento CLI command
- `node` — run node/npm command

### Database
- `db:import` — import database
- `db:export` — export database
- `db:info` — show database connection info (supports `--json`)

### Configuration
- `config:set` — set a config option
- `config:list` — list configuration (supports `--json`)
- `config:cache:clean` / `c:c:c` — clean config cache

### Cron
- `cron:enable` — enable cron
- `cron:disable` — disable cron

### Debug (Xdebug)
- `debug:enable` — enable Xdebug
- `debug:disable` — disable Xdebug
- `debug:profile:enable` — enable profiler
- `debug:profile:disable` — disable profiler

### Scopes (multi-site)
- `scope:add <name>` — add scope
- `scope:list` — list scopes
- `scope:set` — set active scope

### Snapshots
- `snapshot:create` — create snapshot (flag: `--name`)
- `snapshot:restore` — restore snapshot

### Proxy
- `proxy:start` — start nginx proxy
- `proxy:stop` — stop proxy
- `proxy:restart` — restart proxy
- `proxy:rebuild` — rebuild proxy
- `proxy:reload` — reload proxy config
- `proxy:prune` — prune proxy

### Services
- `service:enable` — enable a service
- `service:disable` — disable a service

### Other
- `logs` — show container logs (flag: `--service`)
- `open` — open project in browser (flag: `--service`)
- `ssl:rebuild` — rebuild SSL certificates
- `remote_sync` — synchronize with remote (db, files, media)
- `c:f` / `flush_cache` — flush cache (flag: `--user`)
- `prune` — prune Docker resources (flag: `--with-volumes`)
- `patch:create` — create patch file (flags: `--file`, `--name`, `--title`, `--force`)
- `diff` — show diff between platform versions (flags: `--platform`, `--old`, `--new`)

## Configuration

Config is stored in `.madock/config.xml` (project-level) as hierarchical XML with `/`-separated keys.

### Core Settings
- `platform` — magento2, shopware, shopify, prestashop, custom
- `language` — php, nodejs, python, golang, ruby, none
- `workdir` — working directory inside container (e.g. `/var/www/html`)
- `public_dir` — public directory path
- `timezone` — timezone setting

### PHP
- `php/version` — PHP version (e.g. 8.2)
- `php/composer/version` — Composer version
- `php/xdebug/enabled` — enable Xdebug (true/false)
- `php/xdebug/mode` — Xdebug mode (debug/profile)
- `php/xdebug/ide_key` — IDE key for debugging
- `php/ioncube/enabled` — enable ionCube loader

### Database
- `db/type` — mysql, postgresql, or mongodb
- `db/repository` — Docker image (e.g. mariadb)
- `db/version` — database version
- `db/database` — database name
- `db/user` — database user
- `db/password` — database password
- `db/root_password` — root password
- `db/phpmyadmin` — enable phpMyAdmin (true/false)
- `db/pgadmin` — enable pgAdmin (true/false)
- `db/mongo_express` — enable Mongo Express (true/false)
- `db2/enabled` — enable second database (always MySQL)

### Search Engine
- `search/engine` — elasticsearch or opensearch
- `search/elasticsearch/enabled`, `search/elasticsearch/version`
- `search/opensearch/enabled`, `search/opensearch/version`

### Redis
- `redis/enabled` — enable Redis
- `redis/version` — Redis version

### Node.js
- `nodejs/enabled` — enable Node.js container
- `nodejs/version` — Node.js version
- `nodejs/yarn/enabled` — enable Yarn

### RabbitMQ
- `rabbitmq/enabled` — enable RabbitMQ
- `rabbitmq/version` — RabbitMQ version
- `rabbitmq/user`, `rabbitmq/password` — credentials

### Nginx
- `nginx/ssl` — enable SSL (true/false)
- `nginx/hosts/{code}/name` — domain name (multiple hosts supported)

### Varnish
- `varnish/enabled` — enable Varnish cache

### Cron
- `cron/enabled` — enable cron
- `cron/jobs/d0`, `cron/jobs/d1`, ... — custom cron job entries

### Magento-Specific
- `magento/admin_user`, `magento/admin_password` — admin credentials
- `magento/admin_email`, `magento/admin_frontname` — admin URL path
- `magento/locale`, `magento/currency`, `magento/timezone`
- `magento/cloud` — Magento Cloud mode
- `magento/mftf` — enable MFTF testing
- `magento/n98magerun` — enable n98-magerun

### Scopes
- `scopes/{scope_name}/{option}` — scope-specific config overrides
- `activeScope` — currently active scope (default: "default")

### Custom Commands
- `custom_commands/{name}/alias` — command alias
- `custom_commands/{name}/origin` — command to execute

## Supported Platforms

- **Magento 2** — full support: setup, install, cron, cache, admin, cloud, MFTF, n98-magerun
- **Shopware** — setup, install, cron
- **Shopify** — setup with Node.js support
- **PrestaShop** — setup, install
- **Custom** — any language (PHP, Node.js, Python, Go, Ruby) with configurable services

## Architecture

### How It Works
1. `madock setup` creates `.madock/config.xml` with project settings
2. On `start`/`rebuild`, madock generates `docker-compose.yml` from embedded templates
3. An nginx proxy routes requests by domain to the correct project containers
4. Multiple projects run simultaneously, each with its own containers and network

### Docker Services
Each project can use: php, nginx, db (MySQL/MariaDB/PostgreSQL/MongoDB), db2, redis, valkey, elasticsearch, opensearch, rabbitmq, varnish, nodejs, mailpit, phpmyadmin, pgadmin, mongo_express, grafana, kibana.

### Container Naming
Containers are named: `{container_name_prefix}{project_name}-{service}-1`

### Project Structure
- `.madock/config.xml` — project configuration
- `docker-compose.yml` — generated Docker Compose file (do not edit manually)
- `docker-compose.override.yml` — local overrides (user-editable)

### Extension Points
madock supports enterprise extensions via hooks registered in `init()`:
- `command.Register()` — register new commands
- `command.AddBefore()` / `command.AddAfter()` — lifecycle hooks on existing commands
- `command.Use()` — global middleware
- Platform/setup/service registries for custom platform support

## Build

```bash
go build -o madock .
go test ./...
```

## Optional

- [README](https://github.com/faradey/madock/blob/main/README.md): Full README with installation instructions and screenshots
- [ENTERPRISE_HOOKS.md](https://github.com/faradey/madock/blob/main/ENTERPRISE_HOOKS.md): API reference for all 18 extension points
